case_title: FAHD ALKARSHI VS. CITY WIDE TAXI

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $80.00 SERVED JUN-25-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT C&J LEASING DBA ROYAL TAXI
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT C&J LEASING DBA ROYAL TAXI

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-19-2018 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO NOV-05-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF FAHD ALKARSHI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT C&J LEASING/ CITY WIDE IS PRESENT. PARTIES HAVE UNTIL NOV 5TH TO FILE A DECLARATION AND SUBMIT ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE WITH THE CLERK'S OFFICE. THE MATTER WILL BE TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON THE NEXT CALENDARED DATE; PARTIES DO NOT NEED TO APPEAR AT NOV 5TH HEARING. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION FOR PROOF SERVICE REGARDING DEFENDANT'S EVIDENCE AND DECLARATION ON PLAINTIFF CITYWIDE TA PROVIDED THE ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE THE COURT REQUESTED BUT THERE IS NO PROOF OF SERVICE OF THE EVIDENCE AND DECLARATION ON THE PLAINTIFF. CITY WIDE TAXI SHALL PROVIDE A PROOF OF SERVICE BY THE CONTINUED HEARING DATE. THE NOV 5TH HEARING HAS BEEN TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506) HEARING SET FOR DEC-10-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT C&J LEASING DBA ROYAL TAXI
ORDER RE: CONTINUED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT C&J LEASING DBA ROYAL TAXI
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
RECEIVED DECLARATION OF DAVID HANDLEY, CD AND THUMB DRIVE PER MINUTES OF OCTOBER 19, 2018. FILED BY DEFENDANT C&J LEASING DBA ROYAL TAXI AS TO PLAINTIFF ALKARSHI, FAHD
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY ALKARSHI, FAHD C&J LEASING DBA ROYAL TAXI
DECLARATION RE: AMENDMENT OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM TO CORRECT NAME OF DEFENDANT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALKARSHI, FAHD
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF ALKARSHI, FAHD
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-10-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-10-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCES BY PARTIES NOT REQUIRED: NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY ALKARSHI, FAHD AS TO DEFENDANT C&J LEASING DBA ROYAL TAXI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-03-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-03-2018 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-28-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF FAHD ALKARSHI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY WIDE TAXI IS NOT PRESENT. A REPRESENTATIVE BY THE NAME OF CHARLES HILLEGASS, HIRED BY THE INSURANCE COMPANY WHO INSURES TRUE ENTITY NAME OF DEFENDANT C&J LEASING, INC. DBA ROYAL TAXI, ATTEMPTED TO APPEAR FOR ERRONEOUSLY NAMED DEFENDANT CITY WIDE TAXI. JPT JEAN MILEFF DEEMED THAT REPRESENTATIVE CHARLES HILLEGASS WAS AN IMPROPER REPRESENTATIVE AND DID NOT ALLOW HIS APPEARANCE. PLAINTIFF ERRONEOUSLY NAMED INCORRECT DEFENDANT CITY WIDE TAXI AND THEREFORE CAN NOT PROCEED WITH CURRENT CLAIM. JPT JEAN MILEFF GRANTED PLAINTIFF, ON COURT'S OWN MOTION, A CONTINUANCE TO ALLOW FOR AN AMENDMENT TO CLAIM AND FOR PROPER SERVICE TO BE COMPLETED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
AMENDED AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY ALKARSHI, FAHD AS TO DEFENDANT C&J LEASING DBA ROYAL TAXI
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $80.00 - SERVED SEP-06-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT C&J LEASING DBA ROYAL TAXI

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2018 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO OCT-19-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF FAHD ALKARSHI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS UNTIMELY. A REPRESENTATIVE BY THE NAME OF CHARLES HILLEGASS, HIRED BY THE INSURANCE COMPANY WHO INSURES C&J LEASING, INC. DBA ROYAL TAXI, ATTEMPTED TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT C&J LEASING DBA ROYAL TAXI. HONORABLE CHRISTINE VAN AKEN DEEMED THAT REPRESENTATIVE CHARLES HILLEGASS IS AN IMPROPER REPRESENTATIVE AND DID NOT ALLOW HIS APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF C&J LEASING DBA ROYAL TAXI. MATTER CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE ON COURT'S OWN MOTION. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
PROOF OF SERVICE RE: DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALKARSHI, FAHD AS TO DEFENDANT C&J LEASING DBA ROYAL TAXI
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-10-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALKARSHI, FAHD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT C&J LEASING DBA ROYAL TAXI THE VIDEO EVIDENCE DEMONSTRATES THAT THE CAB DRIVER WAS NOT AT FAULT. THE CAB DRIVER WAS ESTABLISHED IN THE PROCESS OF MAKING A LANE CHANGE BEFORE PLAINTIFF'S CAR STRUCK THE CAB. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
